deviations.what: Breadth-probe: a minimal sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout (header title + section + two subsections). The original's blocks are custom JS view controls (sample:MultiViewBlock) — not expressible in the declarative builder — so they are replaced with sap.m.Text content for the rendering probe.

structural_diff.reason: breadth/capability probe — renders the control but is not a faithful 1:1 rebuild of the full sample
